LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BLAISE HERMSEN'S MOTION TO TAX AND OR STRIKE PORTIONS OF DEFTS COST BILL IS OFF CALENDAR FOR DEPARTMENT 302. THE MOTION SHOULD BE HEARD BY JUDGE TSENIN IN DEPARTMENT 25. THE PARTIES ARE INSTRUCTED TO CONTACT THAT DEPARTMENT (551-0325) TO RESCHEDULE A HEARING DATE. ADDITIONALLY, ALL PARTIES ARE INSTRUCTED TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ALL PAPERS FILED IN SUPPORT OF AND IN OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 25 AS SOON AS A HEARING DATE IS SCHEDULED. calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion To Tax And Or Strike Portions Of Defts Cost Bill
Off Calendar Feb-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF BLAISE HERMSEN's Motion To Tax And Or Strike Portions Of Defts Cost Bill is Off calendar for Department 302. The motion should be heard by Judge Tsenin in Department 25. The parties are instructed to contact that department (551-0325) to reschedule a hearing date. Additionally, all parties are instructed to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and deliver courtesy copies of all papers filed in support of and in opposition to the motion to Department 25 as soon as a hearing date is scheduled. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)
